hero.headline: The electrician Columbus *trusts* with century-old homes
hero.subheadline: When other contractors walk away from tricky wiring, we figure it out. Licensed, insured, and answering our phone.

services_section.label: THE WORK
services_section.heading: Every outlet, panel, and wire — handled
services_section.subheading: From replacing century-old wiring to installing EV chargers

services.title: Electrical Repairs
services.description: Dead outlets, flickering lights, tricky wiring problems. We diagnose the real issue and fix it right.

services.title: Panel Upgrades
services.description: Replace old fuse boxes with modern breaker panels. Safe, code-compliant electrical systems.

services.title: EV Charger Installation
services.description: Professional installation of home electric vehicle charging stations. Quick setup, reasonable rates.

services.title: Lighting Solutions
services.description: New fixtures, switches, and lighting throughout your home. From simple replacements to complex rewiring.

about.heading: Real answers, not runarounds
about.body: We're the Columbus electrical team that shows up when promised and solves problems other contractors avoid. One call, honest pricing, quality work.

reviews.name: Elana O.
reviews.text: So glad to have found a reliable and honest electrician! Jim has done great work twice — replacing fixtures and helping with wiring. Very pleasant and professional.

reviews.name: Wayne H.
reviews.text: James installed an EV charger and did a phenomenal job. Showed up as promised and rates were very reasonable. Highly recommend.

reviews.name: Jenn
reviews.text: Reliable, honest electrician. Jim upgraded our small fuse box to breakers. Kept in contact, quick quality work, fair pricing. Will definitely call again.

service_areas.label: COVERAGE AREA
service_areas.heading: Serving Columbus and surrounding areas
service_areas.subheading: Licensed electrical services throughout central Ohio

cta.heading: Ready to fix that electrical problem?
cta.body: Free estimates on all electrical work. Licensed, insured, and we show up when we say we will.
